title: NasheyPvP
description: this will improve performance while having. Quality of life pvp mods that hopefully helps
body:
**NasheyPvP – Essentials** is a lightweight PvP optimization modpack designed to deliver **smooth, responsive gameplay**, even on **lower-end systems**. Built with performance in mind, this pack focuses on improving FPS, reducing lag, and keeping your game stable during intense PvP fights.

Whether you're playing on busy servers or practicing combat, **NasheyPvP – Essentials** helps ensure your game stays fast and consistent so you can focus on winning fights instead of dealing with frame drops.

This modpack has been **tested on an Intel i5-6200U laptop with HD 520 graphics**, proving that you don't need high-end hardware to enjoy a smooth PvP experience.

### Features

⚔️ **PvP-Focused Optimization** – Tweaks and performance mods designed specifically for combat gameplay.
🚀 **Higher & More Stable FPS** – Reduces lag spikes and improves overall performance.
💻 **Low-End Friendly** – Optimized for older laptops and integrated graphics.
🎮 **Smooth Gameplay** – Better responsiveness during fights and movement.
🧪 **Tested Hardware** – Verified performance on an **i5-6200U with HD 520 graphics**.

If you're looking for a **clean, fast, and reliable PvP experience**, **NasheyPvP – Essentials** is built to give you the advantage.


**OPTIONAL:** *I recommend to use it with lunarclient*
